subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to retrieve Datadog license allocation data (license type, allocated quantity, allocation date, cost center) with historical snapshots
Query SQL warehouse to retrieve Datadog actual usage metrics (hosts monitored, containers, logs ingested, custom metrics) aggregated by time period (monthly/quarterly)

Reconcile license allocations with actual usage metrics; calculate utilization rates, growth rates, variance trends, and identify over/under-provisioned segments; classify usage posture (optimal, underutilized, oversubscribed)

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) fetch allocations, (2) fetch usage metrics — both are separate SQL queries against the same warehouse but with distinct schemas/tables, so they cannot be combined into one sql_gen call. (2) cross_recon is appropriate because the query explicitly asks to compare and analyze two distinct data streams (allocations vs. usage), calculate growth patterns, and classify posture — this is the core reconciliation and analytics task. Tiers: both sql_gen set to mid because they require multi-table joins and aggregation (time-series, cost center grouping). cross_recon is frontier because it must synthesize two data sources, calculate multiple metrics (utilization, growth rates, variance), detect anomalies, and generate classification/insights — this requires complex multi-signal reasoning and inference beyond simple reconciliation. This avoids unnecessary subtasks (no separate policy_action unless compliance audit is requested; no multitool_plan unless external tool orchestration is needed).

output.sql: SELECT cf.license_id, cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_date AS allocation_date, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) AS allocated_quantity, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS allocation_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS active_users, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_seats FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Datadog' AND cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY cf.license_id, cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_date, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY cf.event_date DESC, cf.license_id

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)::DATE AS time_period, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS hosts_monitored, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) AS containers_monitored, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'log_ingestion' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS logs_ingested_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type = 'custom_metric' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS custom_metrics_usd, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_usage_usd FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND cf.publisher ILIKE '%datadog%' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', cf.event_date)::DATE, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.event_type ORDER BY time_period DESC, cf.product, cf.event_type
